text.message: Didn't love my options in 4th here.
Wow.  Nobody took 5 2 to the 6 wheat?
Wanted to keep someone from taking 6 5 12 to the 11 12
What can I say?  Picking 4th on this board had limited optionos
You at least have a path when you port on the 11 `12
i dont think anyone is crushed its just an awkward board
and black you get 9 10 and wood port
You got plowed in a weird way on that 8 3
I didn’t think I have to take that
Told red I wouldn't mess with him
No cards since first road and rob lol
idk about my position being best i just have a lot of brick
And yeah, you're looking pretty good green
and got both my wood pulled lol
whatever i wont complain, ill just say we all have tough game
brick more rare,i still make wood
gonna need a sheep with the wood
Blue had no cards and he was offering
I can do this with a future sheep
Don't have any at the moment
Did we anger blue too much?
was seeing if u had sheep
K, I owe you the sheep
i know u needed to settle xD
i like our deals black but ur winning :D
Ok...green you're looking very good now
i swear if u offer a 2;1 again
blue should be doubling up on that 5
wdym it does nothing for u
What the bot just did is so annoying
like just take a 2 for 1 lol
Had to get one there at all costs
red gonna play spiteful now cuz they hate me xD
I mean, you are also in great shape
yeah i am doing just fine
You can beat the bots road easy
when black is on same as you and im embargo and bot is here lol
its a social game me and black are having fun it seems
the more you talk and collaborate and make deals, the more youll win
Umm, is the bot about to win this?
You might have to take road green
Yeah, but the game could end bro
its fine if the bot wins
I had wood to give you for the connect
We need the bot to roll a 7
I would have given you wood bro
this gae is so far from over
You would have gotten just as much
Can I get any trade from you red?
a 10 is winning for red if its moved
yeah blue leaving kinda killed it
green had monopoly on wheat and brick
yes and u mad i make u pay the price
if i 7 out again thatd be wild
not greedy lol its resource scarcity
gonna put it on the 4 wood
